title: Refactoring CLI: list-symbols and move-symbol commands
description: Add two client-only CLI commands that enable safe file splitting without manually retyping imports. `list-symbols` uses Python's ast module to enumerate all top-level classes, functions, and constants with line numbers and methods. `move-symbol` uses the rope refactoring library to semantically move a symbol to another file and update all imports project-wide. Also adds client-only command support to the CLI registry so these commands (and promote) can run without a Blender server.
definition-of-done: 1. `uv run blender-cli list-symbols --file <path>` returns JSON with all top-level symbols, line numbers, methods, decorators, and bases. 2. `uv run blender-cli move-symbol --source <src> --symbol <name> --dest <dst>` moves the symbol and updates imports across the project. 3. Client-only commands (no `client` param) work without a running Blender instance. 4. `rope` added to pyproject.toml dependencies. 5. Existing CLI commands still work unchanged.
testing-plan: 1. Run `uv run blender-cli list-symbols --file procedural_human/testing/blender_server.py` and verify symbols are listed. 2. Create a test file with a class, run move-symbol to a new file, verify imports updated. 3. Run `uv run blender-cli --help` and verify list-symbols and move-symbol appear. 4. Run `uv run blender-cli ping` to verify existing commands still work.
todos: DONE : Add needs_client field to CliCommand dataclass in cli_registry.py
DONE : Auto-detect client-only commands (no client param) in @cli_command decorator
DONE : Update _run() in blender_cli.py to skip BlenderClient injection for client-only commands
DONE : Create tools/commands/refactor.py with list_symbols and move_symbol
DONE : Add rope dependency to pyproject.toml
DONE : Import refactor module in blender_cli.py
DONE : Run uv sync to install rope
DONE : Verify list-symbols works on blender_server.py
changes-made: tools/cli_registry.py: Added needs_client field, auto-detection of client-only commands
tools/blender_cli.py: Conditional client injection, added refactor import
tools/commands/refactor.py: New file with list_symbols and move_symbol commands
